ddt:Target.Name: USM x61 Soft C5.7 V1.6
ddt:Target.Description:
USM X61 - X84
J.MALFAIT, 01 768 99 210 jerome.malfait@renault.com
Soft : C5.7 Version Base 1.6 Application : Série
Différences entre la version 1.3 et la version 1.6 ====================================== Sans impact Après-vente et usine Ajout de données dans l'onglet organe pour lecture automatique des données lors des prélèvements
Différences entre la version 1.2 et la version 1.3 ====================================== Modification des résolution en écriture des paramètres suivants (Résolution = 20 et pas 0,02): CF_LOW_SPEED_STABLE1 CF_HIGH_SPEED_STABLE1 CF_DELAY_BETWEEN_LOAD CF_WAIT_FAN_UNIT_TIME_OUT
Différence entre la version 1.3 et 1.4 ============================= Ajout du DTC sur la détection de la casse du relais ignition 37396 ($9214) Correction de la liste de la page EM3 = ajout du paramètre : C_B_BatteryLamp

Data.Name: FirstDTC
Data.Description: IGN relay means a problem on Bus Bar connection, low battery voltage, relay problem or reread problem.

List.Item:
Communication Default Type :

1-Open Circuit (type : $01h : "Open Circuit")

2-Short Circuit (type : $0Ch : "Line short circuited")

3-Noise (ACK) (type : $10h : « Disturbed communication »)

Item.Text: Position Lights RH & Rear RH & Plate

Data.Name: Standard Fault
Data.Description:
Coding

  • b7: 0: standard value / 1: system value
  • b6: 0: not memorized failure / 1: memorized failure
  • b5: 0: failure not present / 1: failure present

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault

Data.Name: Output Temporary Control List
Data.Description:
Temporary activation

Time base 1 seconds

  • Fan Unit, Wiper is activated using transition though Low Speed for High speed request
  • The wiper stops in Stop Position
  • Wiper protection is availabled during activation using diagnosis

Data.Name: Output Permanent Control List
Data.Description:
Temporary activation

Time base 1 seconds

  • Fan Unit, Wiper is activated using transition though Low Speed for High speed request
  • The wiper stops in Stop Position
  • Wiper protection is availabled during activation using diagnosis

Item.Text: Not keep IGN until vehicle running (VAC)

Data.Name: C_B_FogLamps_READ
Data.Comment: O_LIGHT-FR-FOG-LAMPS LH and RH (AN-02 and AN-03)

Data.Name: C_B_HeadLampsWasher_READ
Data.Comment: O_WASHER left and right (CN-07 and CN-11)

Item.Text: SOC function is inhibited after C_B_KmIllimited
SOC function is not inhibited after C_B_KmIllimited

Data.Name: C_B_FogLamps_WRITE
Data.Comment: O_LIGHT-FR-FOG-LAMPS LH and RH (AN-02 and AN-03)

Data.Name: C_B_HeadLampsWasher_WRITE
Data.Comment: O_WASHER left and right (CN-07 and CN-11)

Item.Text: Position lights not actived when Low Beam requested
Position lights actived when Low Beam requested
Not Enable Starter when Fan Unit is activated
Enable Starter when Fan Unit is activated

Device.Name: Position Lights RH & Rear RH & Plate

Label.Text: (This command must be launch without Ignition)
It's recommanded to launch fuses and open circuit check command before read DTC
IMPORTANT: For Renault used, only temporary control is allowed.
The fan unit control is available in case of reset only after IGN is ON.
The fan unit control is min 2 seconds to avoid relay quality.
For AC Clutch, Defroster,Oil contact, neutral contact and reverse switch output control, IGNITION is needed.
ECM_CranckingAuthorization_ECM is available only ignition ON
Regime de seconde compression estimé à T°Batterie
Régime de seconde compression estimé à -20°C
Valeur moyenne de la température batterie minimum autorisant le démarrage
Température estimée par l'USM = f(t°eau moteur)
Tension estimée par l'USM sans Charge activée
Inhibition de la consigne de rampe
Image du taux de charge alternateur
Etat du management de l'alternateur par l'USM
Note: Alternator Brand, Class and Failure Status are updated even if ignition is ON.
